note:
0 HOT setups today? You gotta be kidding me. Not even a single WARM one either! This is a rare type of snoozefest, folks. But here's the thing—the market is telling us something. Are we listening? When the squeeze scanner goes radio silent like this, it usually paints a picture of indecision out there. And indecision is a choice on its own. No need to force a play—sit back, set your alerts, and get your shopping list ready. The next wave of setups is coming, but for now, it's about sharpening your tools, not swinging blindly.

Zooming out to the bigger picture, risk feels neutral—no raging bulls, no stomping bears. Full stop. And look, the macro backdrop continues to oscillate between "this is fine" and "oh no, not again." Rates are chopping around, commodities are mixed, and the dollar is stuck in a no-man’s land. When was the last time anyone cared about precious metals? Feels like forever ago, but that’s where things get interesting. Quiet markets and sleeping sectors mean opportunities are brewing. And when they wake up, they wake up fast.

Alright, no HOT setups means there's no shiny new toy to grab today, but let’s not sleep on the portfolio. First off, $BTU is an absolute monster—it doesn’t matter what anyone says about coal being dead. It’s doubled since we got in. That’s leadership. Same deal with $MP, $COIN, and $UUUU. These names have all hit their doubles, and we’re riding the gravy train on the remaining positions. If you’re late to these parties, it’s all good. The risk/reward isn’t what it was, but the risk is still manageable if you’re dying to dip your toe.

For fresh action though, keep an eye on $CF and $OXY. Agriculture and energy are still steady climbers in a market that’s begging for direction. $CF is clearing levels like a boss—if it takes out $5, it’s game on for the next leg higher. And $OXY, well, energy’s been working since… forever, right? If crude rips higher (and oh boy, it looks ready), don’t be surprised when $OXY tags $2 in no time.

What am I watching today? Don’t sleep on China. $LI, $NIO, and $GDS are all quietly building base-on-base patterns. The whole region might be setting up for a rotation. If these can break out, they'll do it in a big way. Keep tabs on headlines out of Asia—sentiment shifts fast. And crypto? It’s still holding the narrative. $BMNR, $ETHA, and $SBET are grinding higher. When the world stops staring at their screens in disbelief about 0 HOT setups and remembers there’s a whole market out there, these could be the names that fly.

No flashy board to lean on this morning, but that’s when you want to look even closer. Boring markets don’t stay boring for long. Get ready.
